title: common-ats
description: Generic ATS interface — Bullhorn-only in v1.0 per bullhorn-integration-path.md §4 Sub-decision C; extensible to other ATSes in v1.1+. Per PRODUCT-SPEC §5.3 line 361.

ats_choice.description: Single value in v1.0 per Sub-decision C; v1.1+ may add jobadder/vincere/etc.

tenant_corp_id.description: Bullhorn corporation ID; one per tenant. Loaded from _secrets.env.

bullhorn_cluster.description: Bullhorn data centre; UK default for IFOS UK-first geography.

oauth_token_path.description: Where the BULLHORN_OAUTH_TOKEN env var is sourced. Refreshed by per-agent 8-minute cycle per bullhorn-integration-path.md §4.5.

auth_refresh_interval_seconds.description: 8-min cycle per bullhorn-integration-path.md §4.5; under 10-min Bullhorn token TTL.

rate_limit_backoff_seconds.description: Initial 429 backoff; exponential up to 30s per bullhorn-integration-path.md §2.2.

field_mapping_overrides.description: Tenant-specific Bullhorn field aliases. Keys = canonical IFOS field names from vertical-schema.yaml; values = tenant's Bullhorn field IDs.
